_meta.title: Flux.1 Canny ControlNet Basic Workflow
_meta.description: Uses flux1-canny-dev full model for edge-guided image generation. Day 29 学习工作流。
_meta.author: bobo-learning

1._comment: Load Flux Canny Dev full model (12B). Place in models/diffusion_models/

2._comment: Flux requires dual text encoders: T5-XXL + CLIP-L

inputs.text: A beautiful cyberpunk cityscape at night, neon lights reflecting on wet streets, flying cars, holographic advertisements, cinematic lighting, 8k

4._comment: Load pre-processed Canny edge map. Use ComfyUI-Advanced-ControlNet or comfyui_controlnet_aux for preprocessing.

5._comment: Flux official ControlNet models use InpaintModelConditioning for control image injection

6._comment: Flux uses lower CFG (3.5) vs SD's typical 7.5. Steps 20-30 for dev model.

8._comment: Flux uses its own VAE (ae.safetensors), not standard SD VAE
